dialog.stepLabel: Mysterious Sound: "As the sun beats down and the ocean breeze lulls you, your e..."

items.speaker: Mysterious Sound
items.text: As the sun beats down and the ocean breeze lulls you, your eyes can't help but be drawn to the massive shadow looming over the beach. It beckons to you, calling for your attention and submission—Those man-made, sinister shadows will dance for you. You need only wave the scepter in your hand.

items.speaker: Mysterious Sound
items.text: "Yes, you remember what those shadows looked like. The memories are crystal clear. They flow in and out of your mind like waves, yet they leave you with nothing to keep."

items.speaker: Mysterious Sound
items.text: "Yes… like waves. Time and tears swirl together in an eternal dance. I admit, you know everything about the past and future. Yet here you are, shipwrecked in this era, stumbling like a newborn. Welcome to this era, Rover, as you awaken again… that's my warm greeting for you."

items.speaker: Mysterious Sound
items.text: Heed my advice: Don't touch the truth yet. This is for your own good.

options.text: I still have work to do.
